description: a model with one concern that covers the same concept — acceptable even if the concern name is slightly generic
input:
module Archivable
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern

  included do
    scope :archived, -> { where.not(archived_at: nil) }
    scope :active, -> { where(archived_at: nil) }
  end

  def archive!
    update!(archived_at: Time.current)
  end

  def unarchive!
    update!(archived_at: nil)
  end

  def archived? = archived_at.present?
end
